title: Bonamia capitata
taxonomy: Bonamia capitata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is a member of the genus Bonamia, which is a group of plants native to Africa. The genus Bonamia is further classified under the subfamily Asclepiadoideae, which is a subfamily of plants within the Apocynaceae family. Bonamia capitata is a specific species within the Bonamia genus and is known for its unique characteristics. More research is needed to fully understand the classification and relationships of Bonamia capitata.
